caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black and blue baseball cap, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, speaking while looking slightly to his left. In the background, a wall displays the word "HUSTLE" repeated vertically alongside rows of gold stars. To the right, a portion of a sign reads "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man maintains his position and continues speaking, with subtle changes in his facial expressions and mouth movements as he talks. He remains focused on the person or area off-camera to his left throughout the duration of the clip.
